title: Hypotheses, Riskiest Assumptions, and Disposable Prototypes
description: A team starts production architecture while desirability, usability, feasibility, viability, safety, and operating assumptions remain untested. Learners cumulatively produce ranked assumption map and prototype evidence through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Express desirable, usable, feasible, viable, ethical, accessible, secure, and operable assumptions as falsifiable claims.
Prioritize assumptions by uncertainty, consequence, dependency, and cheapest discriminating evidence.
Choose paper, clickable, coded, data, integration, or operational prototype fidelity to answer one question without production overinvestment.
